name: Osso Bucco Alla Milanese
recipeIngredient: 1 large Ripe tomato, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut two veal shanks into 2-inch pieces.
2. Roll the shanks in flour and sauté in butter over medium-high heat until brown on all sides.
3. Add salt, pepper, celery, onion, carrots, mushrooms, tomato, sage, and rosemary to the pot.
4. Reduce heat to low, cover, and braise for 10 minutes.
5. Pour in white wine and return to a gentle simmer. Cover and cook for an additional 2 hours, ensuring the liquid barely covers the meat.
6. Just before serving, stir in the gremolada, which consists of grated lemon rind, chopped parsley, mashed anchovy, and minced garlic.
7. Serve with cooked rice.
